scripts.dev: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/free-ports.ps1 -Quiet && npm run build -w @whatsnext/shared && concurrently -k -n shared,api,web -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @whatsnext/shared" "npm run dev -w @whatsnext/api" "npm run dev -w @whatsnext/web"
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/clean-web.ps1 && npm run dev
scripts.db:migrate: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/ensure-db.ps1 && npm run migrate -w @whatsnext/database
scripts.db:seed: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/ensure-db.ps1 && npm run seed -w @whatsnext/database
scripts.db:push: npm run generate -w @whatsnext/database && cd packages/database && npx prisma db push
